Title: Deploy your AI Copilot with Azure Kubernetes
Description: Learn how to deploy an AI copilot app using Docker, Azure Container Resource, and Azure Kubernetes Service.

Title: Introduction to generative AI - Exploring the basics
Description: By understanding the basics of generative AI models, you empower yourself to make responsible decisions when using these models. This knowledge allows you to critically evaluate outputs, assess their reliability, and understand potential limitations leading to more informed and effective interactions with generative AI.

Title: Deploy a Spring Boot app to Azure Container Apps
Description: In this module, you learn how to deploy a Spring Boot app to Azure Container Apps. You deploy a Spring Boot application to Azure Container Apps and maintain it using the built-in Java stack.

Title: Get tips and tricks for teaching MB-910: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Fundamentals (CRM)
Description: Learn tips and tricks about preparing for your first teaching session, which labs to use, when and how to introduce technical topics, as well as other resources and materials.

Title: Analyze query results using KQL
Description: Analyze query results using KQL

Title: Develop products with accessible color and contrast
Description: Learn the importance of color and contrast in digital design for accessibility.

Title: Explore governance and manageability for SAP on Azure
Description: This module explores using the Azure Governance collection of concepts and services that are designed to enable management of Azure resources at scale. Prepare for Exam AZ-120 Planning and Administering Microsoft Azure for SAP Workloads.

Title: Introduction to Zero Trust and best practice frameworks
Description: You learn about security best practices and antipatterns, the concept of Zero Trust and its guiding principles, and key best practice frameworks including CAF, WAF, MCRA, and MCSB. You also learn about the Zero Trust adoption framework and how the frameworks relate to each other.

Title: Introduction to large language models
Description: Learn about large language models, their core concepts, the models that are available to use, and when to use them.

Title: Maintain user profiles
Description: Students learn about the benefits of various Windows user profiles, how to manage them, and how to facilitate profile data synchronization across multiple devices.

Title: Optimizing tightly coupled HPC applications on HBv2, HC, and HB series virtual machines
Description: Learn how to build, run, and tune tightly coupled HPC applications in Azure.

Title: Understand device management using Microsoft Intune
Description: In this module, you learn about how your organization's devices can be provisioned and managed. Additionally, you learn about the different types of enrollment methods available using Microsoft Intune.

Title: Develop a generative AI chat app with Microsoft Foundry
Description: Use Microsoft Foundry to develop generative AI chat applications with projects and the Responses API.

Title: Implement enum, struct, and record types
Description: Learn to create organized, maintainable code with enum, struct, and record types in C#.

Title: Explore Microsoft Dev Box deployment guidelines and best practices
Description: This module describes the details and the best practices for deploying Microsoft Dev Box in your organization.

Title: Perform device investigations in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
Description: Perform device investigations in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint

Title: Tune hyperparameters in Azure Databricks
Description: Learn how to use the Optuna library in Azure Databricks to tune machine learning hyperparameters.

Title: Manage data sources and holds in Microsoft Purview eDiscovery
Description: Manage data sources and holds in Microsoft Purview eDiscovery

Title: Microsoft Learn for Educators Course Preparation
Description: Your students want skills that make them employable. Using the resources available from Microsoft will help you feel confident to teach your students the skills they need to help them pass a Microsoft Certification exam.

Title: Introduction to end-to-end analytics using Microsoft Fabric
Description: Discover how Microsoft Fabric can meet your enterprise's analytics needs in one platform. Discover the capabilities Fabric has to offer, understand how it works, and identify how you can use Fabric for your analytics needs.

Title: Import data in different formats for use in scripts by using Windows PowerShell cmdlets
Description: This module explains how to import data from a text file, CSV file, XML file, and JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) file.

Title: Microsoft tenant setup for Surface Support Portal access
Description: In this module, you'll learn how to set up a Microsoft tenant to access the Surface Support Portal and manage your Surface devices effectively.

Title: Design the Azure Virtual Desktop architecture
Description: Design the Azure Virtual Desktop architecture

Title: Introduction to Azure Virtual Networks
Description: In this module, you learn how to design and implement Azure networking services. You learn about virtual networks, public and private IPs, DNS, virtual network peering, routing, and Azure Virtual NAT.

Title: Automate identity lifecycle using Lifecycle Workflows in Microsoft Entra
Description: Explore the configuration and deployment of Microsoft Entra Lifecycle Workflows. Learn the purpose of lifecycle workflows, their components, and how to implement them effectively.

Title: Create readable code with conventions, whitespace, and comments in C#
Description: Write code that is easier to read, update and support using naming conventions, comments and whitespace.

Title: Translate Text with Azure Translator and Azure Database for PostgreSQL
Description: Learn how to translate Text with Azure Translator and Azure Database for PostgreSQL.

Title: Configure Microsoft Defender for Cloud for Azure Arc-enabled servers
Description: By the end of this module, you'll understand how Microsoft Defender for Cloud for Azure Arc-enabled servers can help you protect your cloud-based applications from various cyber threats.

Title: Understand and plan data loss prevention
Description: Understand and plan data loss prevention.

Title: Secure your Azure resources with Azure role-based access control (Azure RBAC)
Description: Learn how to use Azure role-based access control to effectively manage your team's access to Azure resources.

Title: Troubleshooting Windows Containers
Description: Learn about the Windows containerization platform and how to troubleshoot it. Learn various troubleshooting techniques, using Docker, Azure, or native Windows tools.

Title: Choose the best Windows upgrade path after Windows 10 end of support
Description: Learn how to assess and recommend the best Windows upgrade path after Windows 10 end of support using structured decision criteria and real-world scenarios.

Title: Management and customization considerations with GitHub Copilot
Description: Management and customization control are a vital part of using an AI pair programming tool. With a better understanding of the GitHub Copilot plans and their associated features, you can select the right fit for your organization's needs.

Title: Troubleshoot business continuity with Microsoft Azure
Description: Businesses rely on data for decision making, compliance, and for day-to-day operations. When systems fail for any reason, data backups must be reliable so that data can be recovered. This module covers some of the issues you may encounter when troubleshooting Azure backup and recovery. AZ720 AZ-720 az-720 networking

Title: Protect AI workloads with Microsoft Defender for Cloud
Description: Learn how Microsoft Defender for Cloud extends protection to AI workloads across Azure. See how it discovers AI resources, assesses configuration risks, detects active threats, and integrates with Microsoft Defender XDR for unified investigation and response.

Title: Use Live Captions in Windows to better understand audio
Description: In this module, you'll learn how Live Captions helps you follow spoken content in real time, making it easier to stay productive and access information in various environments and accessibility scenarios.

Title: Challenge project - Develop foreach and if-elseif-else structures to process array data in C#
Description: Demonstrate your ability to update a console app that implements arrays, foreach loops, and if statements in response to a user requested feature update.

Title: Implement Azure OpenAI keyless authentication with Java
Description: Learn how to use Microsoft Entra ID, Azure RBAC, DefaultAzureCredential, and managed identities to authenticate Java apps to Azure OpenAI in Microsoft Foundry without API keys.

Title: Configure and manage costs as a Microsoft partner by using Microsoft Cost Management
Description: Learn how to reconcile your bill and analyze costs across your customers and resources by using Microsoft Cost Management as a partner.

Title: Query a data warehouse in Microsoft Fabric
Description: Learn to query a Microsoft Fabric data warehouse using the SQL query editor, visual query editor, and SQL Server Management Studio.

Title: Introduction to GitHub Packages
Description: Learn how to use GitHub Packages to publish, install, delete, and restore packages. Explore package access control, visibility settings, and authentication methods for secure package management in GitHub repositories.

Description: Learn how to use Azure App Configuration service to centrally manage and secure your configuration settings, and to manage app features.

Description: Learn how to identify large multi-purpose functions and how to refactor large functions into smaller helper classes and static methods by using GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio Code.

Title: Troubleshoot connectivity issues with virtual machines in Microsoft Azure
Description: Troubleshoot deployment, connectivity, and authorization issues with Azure Bastion and just in time access to Virtual Machines. AZ720 AZ-720 az-720 networking

Description: This module implements CICD pipeline for edge devices.

Description: This module introduces Azure and its capabilities for building AI solutions. Explore the key features and benefits of using Microsoft Foundry for AI development.

Description: Learn how to authenticate users with Microsoft Entra ID and get authorized access to data in a Java web app using Microsoft Authentication Library.

Title: Manage Internet Information Services
Description: Learn how to manage Internet Information Services (IIS) using IIS Manager, PowerShell, and command-line tools.

Title: Tooling, MCP, and Agent Execution Environments
Description: This module introduces how modern software agents interact with tools, APIs, and execution environments to perform meaningful tasks. It covers the role of Model Context Protocol (MCP), GitHub Actions, and agentic workflows in enabling scalable and controlled agent execution. You will also learn how GitHub ensures security and governance through defined execution boundaries and safeguards.

Title: Migrate to vCore-based Azure Cosmos DB for MongoDB
Description: Migrate to vCore-based Azure Cosmos DB for MongoDB.

Description: learn about Azure DNS Private Resolver and how to use it to resolve DNS queries from on-premises to cloud.

Title: Train and evaluate clustering models
Description: Clustering is a type of machine learning that is used to group similar items into clusters.

Title: Build queries for Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
Description: Learn how to connect to Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL, use the SDK to perform CRUD operations, and write SQL queries to retrieve document data for AI applications.

Title: Monitor and maintain Microsoft Entra ID
Description: Audit and diagnostic logs within Microsoft Entra ID provide a rich view into how users are accessing your Azure solution. Learn to monitor, troubleshoot, and analyze sign-in data.

Description: Find out how to build your startup team and find cofounders. Learn how to benefit from diversity in teams, mentors, and risk management measures.

Description: Review responsible AI principles for language models in in Azure Databricks

Description: Characterize DevOps Continuous Collaboration and Continuous Improvement

Description: Implement Fabric-native governance practices including data classification, sensitivity labels, endorsement, and documentation to ensure data assets are trustworthy and governed for both human and AI consumption.

Title: Segment and isolate Azure workloads using network security controls
Description: Segment Azure workloads to control lateral movement and enforce least-privilege network access. Design and configure Network Security Group (NSG) and Application Security Group (ASG) rules with a security-first approach, enforce organization-wide policies using Azure Virtual Network Manager, and verify effective security posture using Network Watcher diagnostics.

Title: Design resilient code with interfaces
Description: In this module, you explore advanced concepts of interfaces in C#. You learn how to implement explicit interface members, combine multiple interfaces, and reduce code dependencies using interfaces.

Title: Get tips and tricks for teaching SC- 300: Microsoft Identity and Access Administrator
Description: Learn tips and tricks about preparing for your first teaching session, which labs to use, when and how to introduce technical topics, as well as other resources and materials.

Title: Get started with Azure Advisor
Description: Learn how to use Azure Advisor to optimize your Azure usage, lower costs, and increase efficiency.

Title: Introduction to Microsoft Intune
Description: In this module, you learn about the basics of Microsoft Intune and about Intune and Configuration Manager endpoint management.

Title: Onboard your first OT sensor to Microsoft Defender for IoT
Description: Learn how to onboard an OT sensor as part of the deployment of Microsoft Defender for IoT to monitor your OT network.

Title: Build and deploy applications to Azure by using GitHub Actions
Description: Create two deployment workflows using GitHub Actions and Microsoft Azure. Learn about triggering a CD workflow and storing credentials.

Title: Configure and manage Hyper-V virtual machines
Description: Configure and manage Hyper-V virtual machines

Title: Work with files and directories in a .NET app
Description: Learn how to use .NET, C#, and System.IO to work with directories, paths, files, and the file system.

Description: In this module, you learn about integrating Azure Identity Services with SAP RISE, implementing single sign-on, transitioning from SAP Identity Management to Microsoft Entra, using Microsoft Security Copilot and Microsoft Sentinel with SAP RISE.

Description: Analyze data in PostgreSQL with aggregate functions and grouping. Learn COUNT, SUM, AVG, and filter results using GROUP BY and HAVING.

Description: Learn how to optimize your workload to meet performance requirements while balancing costs, reliability, and security.

Description: Evaluate how Microsoft Designer and Copilot support creative planning, storyboarding, and script writing tasks for music video preproduction.

Description: Learn how to select fine-tuning methods (SFT, RFT, DPO), recognize agent quality problems, prepare training data, and design optimization strategies using hyperparameter configuration and iterative evaluation.

Description: This content is a part of Explore fundamental relational data concepts.

Description: In this module, you’ll discover how Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot in Word can help you quickly create a campaign brief. We’ll practice using an example application, but the fundamental skills can be used to create briefs for any product.

Description: Migrate Linux and PostgreSQL workloads to Azure by using an Azure virtual machine and Azure Database for PostgreSQL.

Description: In this module, you practice configuring secure access to workloads using Azure virtual networking. The lab combines both learning and hands-on practice.

Description: Collaborate with enterprise-grade pull request workflows, advanced collaboration patterns, and strategic code review practices in Azure Repos for scalable DevOps implementations.
